properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 105/18
ANDOYA TEST CENTER WILL CONDUCT TEST OF MILITARY SYSTEMS FROM ANDOEYA, IN THE PERIOD  17 -20 SEP 18, AND 24-28 SEP 18. THE TEST WILL BE CONDUCTED BETWEEN 0800 -1600 UTC IN THE ANNOUNCED TIME PERIOD.
SEAGOING TRAFFIC IS REQUESTED TO BE AWARE OF AND STAY OUTSIDE THE FOLLOWING DANGER AREA DURING THE ANNOUNCED TIME PERIOD.

DANGER AREA:
A. 69-16.0N 015-32.0E.
B. 69-08,0N 015-39.0E.
C. 69-06.0N 015-32.0E.
D. 69-13.0N 015-12.0E.
